## FacetsService.deselect() method

Deselects filter, adding it to the store if it was not present.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
deselect(filter: Filter): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  filter | Filter | The filter to deselect. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
